/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/camera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/camera_detection_interfaces/srv/detail/detect_pipe__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
